000008  24ff              MOVS     r4,#0xff
                  |L1.10|
00000a  540c              STRB     r4,[r1,r0]
00000c  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00000e  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
000010  2808              CMP      r0,#8
000012  d3fa              BCC      |L1.10|
000014  2033              MOVS     r0,#0x33
000016  f7fffffe          BL       SWJ_Sequence

00001c  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00001e  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
000020  20e7              MOVS     r0,#0xe7
000022  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
000024  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10

00002c  4669              MOV      r1,sp
                  |L1.46|
00002e  540c              STRB     r4,[r1,r0]

000032  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
000034  2808              CMP      r0,#8
000036  d3fa              BCC      |L1.46|
000038  2033              MOVS     r0,#0x33
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       SWJ_Sequence
00003e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000040  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000042  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
000044  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000046  f7fffffe          BL       SWJ_Sequence

00004c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_dp
000052  2801              CMP      r0,#1
;;;759        uint32_t tmp = 0;
;;;760    
;;;761        if (!swd_reset()) {
;;;762            return 0;
;;;763        }
;;;764    
;;;765        if (!swd_switch(0xE79E)) {
;;;766            return 0;
;;;767        }
;;;768    
;;;769        if (!swd_reset()) {
000054  d000              BEQ      |L1.88|
;;;770            return 0;
;;;771        }
;;;772    
;;;773        if (!swd_read_idcode(&tmp)) {
;;;774            return 0;
000056  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L1.88|
;;;775        }
;;;776    
;;;777        return 1;
;;;778    }
000058  b002              ADD      sp,sp,#8
00005a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;779    
                          ENDP

                  int2array PROC
;;;78     
;;;79     void int2array(uint8_t *res, uint32_t data, uint8_t len)
000000  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
;;;80     {
;;;81         uint8_t i = 0;
;;;82     
;;;83         for (i = 0; i < len; i++) {
000002  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
000004  d90a              BLS      |L2.28|
000006  b430              PUSH     {r4,r5}               ;80
                  |L2.8|
;;;84             res[i] = (data >> 8 * i) & 0xff;

00000c  40ec              LSRS     r4,r4,r5
00000e  54c4              STRB     r4,[r0,r3]

;;;86     }

00001a  4770              BX       lr

00001c  4770              BX       lr
;;;87

                  swd_flash_syscall_exec PROC
;;;681    
;;;682    uint8_t swd_flash_syscall_exec(const program_syscall_t *sysCallParam, uint32_t entry, uint32_t arg1, uint32_t arg2, uint32_t arg3, uint32_t arg4)
000000  b5ff              PUSH     {r0-r7,lr}
;;;683    {
000002  b093              SUB      sp,sp,#0x4c
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;684        DEBUG_STATE state = {{0}, 0};
000008  2144              MOVS     r1,#0x44
00000a  4668              MOV      r0,sp
00000c  9e1d              LDR      r6,[sp,#0x74]
00000e  9d1c              LDR      r5,[sp,#0x70]
000010  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;685        // Call flash algorithm function on target and wait for result.
;;;686        state.r[0]     = arg1;                   // R0: Argument 1
000014  9815              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x54]
;;;687        state.r[1]     = arg2;                   // R1: Argument 2
;;;688        state.r[2]     = arg3;                   // R2: Argument 3
;;;689        state.r[3]     = arg4;                   // R3: Argument 4
;;;690        state.r[9]     = sysCallParam->static_base;    // SB: Static Base

000018  9701              STR      r7,[sp,#4]
00001a  9603              STR      r6,[sp,#0xc]
00001c  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
00001e  6860              LDR      r0,[r4,#4]
;;;691        state.r[13]    = sysCallParam->stack_pointer;  // SP: Stack Pointer

000022  68a0              LDR      r0,[r4,#8]
;;;692        state.r[14]    = sysCallParam->breakpoint;     // LR: Exit Point

;;;693        state.r[15]    = entry;                        // PC: Entry Point

;;;694        state.xpsr     = 0x01000000;          // xPSR: T = 1, ISR = 0
00002c  900f              STR      r0,[sp,#0x3c]
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000030  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
000032  9010              STR      r0,[sp,#0x40]
;;;695    
;;;696        if (!swd_write_debug_state(&state)) {

000036  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000038  2008              MOVS     r0,#8

000042  2400              MOVS     r4,#0

                  |L4.184|

;;;698        }

;;;701            return 0;
;;;702        }
;;;703    
;;;704        if (!swd_read_core_register(0, &state.r[0])) {

0000e0  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000e2  d003              BEQ      |L4.236|
;;;705            return 0;
;;;706        }
;;;707    
;;;708        // Flash functions return 0 if successful.
;;;709        if (state.r[0] != 0) {
0000e4  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
0000e6  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000e8  d006              BEQ      |L4.248|
                  |L4.234|
;;;710            return 0;
0000ea  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L4.236|
;;;711        }
;;;712    
;;;713        return 1;
;;;714    }
0000ec  b017              ADD      sp,sp,#0x5c
0000ee  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L4.240|

                  |L4.248|

0000fc  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;715    
                          ENDP

                  swd_init PROC
;;;104    
;;;105    uint8_t swd_init(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;106    {
;;;107        //TODO - DAP_Setup puts GPIO pins in a hi-z state which can
;;;108        //       cause problems on re-init.  This needs to be investigated
;;;109        //       and fixed.
;;;110        DAP_Setup();
000002  f7fffffe          BL       DAP_Setup
000006  4808              LDR      r0,|L5.40|
000008  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
00000a  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]
00000c  2140              MOVS     r1,#0x40
00000e  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]
000010  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]
000012  6943              LDR      r3,[r0,#0x14]
000014  4313              ORRS     r3,r3,r2
000016  6143              STR      r3,[r0,#0x14]
000018  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
00001a  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
00001c  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
00001e  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
000020  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
000022  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;111        PORT_SWD_SETUP();
;;;112        return 1;
000024  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;113    }
000026  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;114    
                          ENDP

                  swd_init_debug PROC
;;;779    
;;;780    uint8_t swd_init_debug(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;781    {
;;;782        uint32_t tmp = 0;
;;;783        int i = 0;
;;;784        int timeout = 100;
;;;785        // init dap state with fake values
;;;786        dap_state.select = 0xffffffff;
000002  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000004  43c9              MVNS     r1,r1
000006  483f              LDR      r0,|L6.260|

;;;787        dap_state.csw = 0xffffffff;
00000a  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]  ; dap_state
;;;788        
;;;789        int8_t retries = 4;
00000c  2604              MOVS     r6,#4
00000e  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]  ; dap_state
                  |L6.16|
;;;790        int8_t do_abort = 0;
000010  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000012  e013              B        |L6.60|
                  |L6.20|
;;;791        do {
;;;792            if (do_abort) {
000014  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
000016  d011              BEQ      |L6.60|
;;;793                //do an abort on stale target, then reset the device
;;;794                swd_write_dp(DP_ABORT, DAPABORT);
000018  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00001a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
;;;795                swd_set_target_reset(1);
000020  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000022  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
;;;796                os_dly_wait(2);
000026  4f38              LDR      r7,|L6.264|
000028  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
00002a  46bc              MOV      r12,r7
00002c  df00              SVC      #0x0
;;;797                swd_set_target_reset(0);
00002e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000030  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
;;;798                os_dly_wait(2);
000034  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000036  46bc              MOV      r12,r7
000038  df00              SVC      #0x0
;;;799                do_abort = 0;
00003a  e7e9              B        |L6.16|
                  |L6.60|
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       DAP_Setup
000040  4832              LDR      r0,|L6.268|
000042  2320              MOVS     r3,#0x20
000044  6043              STR      r3,[r0,#4]
000046  2140              MOVS     r1,#0x40
000048  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]
00004a  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]
00004c  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
00004e  431a              ORRS     r2,r2,r3
000050  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
000052  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
000054  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
000056  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
000058  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
00005a  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
00005c  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;800            }
;;;801            swd_init();
;;;802            // call a target dependant function
;;;803            // this function can do several stuff before really
;;;804            // initing the debug
;;;805            target_before_init_debug();
00005e  f7fffffe          BL       target_before_init_debug
;;;806    
;;;807            if (!JTAG2SWD()) {
000062  f7fffffe          BL       JTAG2SWD
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000068  d02a              BEQ      |L6.192|
00006a  211e              MOVS     r1,#0x1e
00006c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00006e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
000072  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000074  d024              BEQ      |L6.192|
;;;808                do_abort = 1;
;;;809                continue;
;;;810            }
;;;811    
;;;812            if (!swd_clear_errors()) {
;;;813                do_abort = 1;
;;;814                continue;
;;;815            }
;;;816    
;;;817            if (!swd_write_dp(DP_SELECT, 0)) {
000076  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000078  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
00007a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
00007e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000080  d01e              BEQ      |L6.192|
;;;818                do_abort = 1;
;;;819                continue;
;;;820                
;;;821            }
;;;822            
;;;823            // Power up
;;;824            if (!swd_write_dp(DP_CTRL_STAT, CSYSPWRUPREQ | CDBGPWRUPREQ)) {
000082  2105              MOVS     r1,#5
000084  0709              LSLS     r1,r1,#28
000086  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
000088  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
00008c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00008e  d017              BEQ      |L6.192|
;;;825                do_abort = 1;
;;;826                continue;
;;;827            }
;;;828    
;;;829            for (i = 0; i < timeout; i++) {
000090  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
000092  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
000094  dd22              BLE      |L6.220|
                  |L6.150|
000096  2006              MOVS     r0,#6
000098  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00009a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
00009e  466a              MOV      r2,sp
0000a0  78d1              LDRB     r1,[r2,#3]
0000a2  7892              LDRB     r2,[r2,#2]
0000a4  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
0000a6  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
0000a8  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
0000aa  466a              MOV      r2,sp
0000ac  7852              LDRB     r2,[r2,#1]
0000ae  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8
0000b0  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
0000b2  466a              MOV      r2,sp
0000b4  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]
0000b6  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
0000b8  2801              CMP      r0,#1
0000ba  d008              BEQ      |L6.206|
;;;830                if (!swd_read_dp(DP_CTRL_STAT, &tmp)) {
;;;831                    do_abort = 1;
0000bc  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
;;;832                    break;
0000be  e00d              B        |L6.220|
                  |L6.192|
0000c0  1e76              SUBS     r6,r6,#1              ;813
0000c2  2401              MOVS     r4,#1                 ;813
;;;833                }
;;;834                if ((tmp & (CDBGPWRUPACK | CSYSPWRUPACK)) == (CDBGPWRUPACK | CSYSPWRUPACK)) {
;;;835                    // Break from loop if powerup is complete
;;;836                    break;
;;;837                }
;;;838            }
;;;839            if ((i == timeout) || (do_abort == 1)) {
;;;840                // Unable to powerup DP
;;;841                do_abort = 1;
;;;842                continue;
;;;843            }
;;;844    
;;;845            if (!swd_write_dp(DP_CTRL_STAT, CSYSPWRUPREQ | CDBGPWRUPREQ | TRNNORMAL | MASKLANE)) {
;;;846                do_abort = 1;
;;;847                continue;
;;;848            }
;;;849    
;;;850            // call a target dependant function:
;;;851            // some target can enter in a lock state
;;;852            // this function can unlock these targets
;;;853            target_unlock_sequence();
;;;854    
;;;855            if (!swd_write_dp(DP_SELECT, 0)) {
;;;856                do_abort = 1;
;;;857                continue;
;;;858            }
;;;859            
;;;860            return 1;
;;;861        
;;;862        } while (--retries > 0);
0000c4  b276              SXTB     r6,r6
0000c6  2e00              CMP      r6,#0
0000c8  dca4              BGT      |L6.20|
;;;863        
;;;864        return 0;
0000ca  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;865    }
0000cc  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L6.206|
0000ce  2005              MOVS     r0,#5                 ;834
0000d0  0740              LSLS     r0,r0,#29             ;834
0000d2  4388              BICS     r0,r0,r1              ;834
0000d4  d002              BEQ      |L6.220|
0000d6  1c7f              ADDS     r7,r7,#1              ;834
0000d8  42af              CMP      r7,r5                 ;829
0000da  dbdc              BLT      |L6.150|
                  |L6.220|
0000dc  42af              CMP      r7,r5                 ;839
0000de  d0ef              BEQ      |L6.192|
0000e0  2c01              CMP      r4,#1                 ;839
0000e2  d0ed              BEQ      |L6.192|
0000e4  490a              LDR      r1,|L6.272|
0000e6  2004              MOVS     r0,#4                 ;845
0000e8  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
0000ec  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;845
0000ee  d0e7              BEQ      |L6.192|
0000f0  f7fffffe          BL       target_unlock_sequence
0000f4  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;855
0000f6  2008              MOVS     r0,#8                 ;855
0000f8  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
0000fc  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;855
0000fe  d0df              BEQ      |L6.192|
000100  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;860
000102  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;866    
                          ENDP

                  |L6.260|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L6.264|
                          DCD      rt_dly_wait
                  |L6.268|
                          DCD      0x400ff080
                  |L6.272|
                          DCD      0x50000f00

                          AREA ||i.swd_off||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_off PROC
;;;114    
;;;115    uint8_t swd_off(void)
000000  4806              LDR      r0,|L7.28|
000002  6941              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x14]
000004  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
000006  4391              BICS     r1,r1,r2
000008  6141              STR      r1,[r0,#0x14]
00000a  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
00000c  2140              MOVS     r1,#0x40
00000e  438a              BICS     r2,r2,r1
000010  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
000012  6942              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
000014  438a              BICS     r2,r2,r1
000016  6142              STR      r2,[r0,#0x14]
;;;116    {
;;;117        PORT_OFF();
;;;118        return 1;
000018  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;119    }
00001a  4770              BX       lr
;;;120    
                          ENDP

                  |L7.28|
                          DCD      0x400ff080

                          AREA ||i.swd_read_ap||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  swd_read_ap PROC
;;;171    // Read access port register.
;;;172    uint8_t swd_read_ap(uint32_t adr, uint32_t *val)
000000  b538              PUSH     {r3-r5,lr}
;;;173    {
000002  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;174        uint8_t tmp_in, ack;
;;;175        uint8_t tmp_out[4];
;;;176        uint32_t tmp;
;;;177        uint32_t apsel = adr & 0xff000000;
000004  0e01              LSRS     r1,r0,#24
000006  4605              MOV      r5,r0                 ;173
;;;178        uint32_t bank_sel = adr & APBANKSEL;
000008  22f0              MOVS     r2,#0xf0
00000a  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24             ;177
00000c  4010              ANDS     r0,r0,r2
;;;179    
;;;180        if (!swd_write_dp(DP_SELECT, apsel | bank_sel)) {
00000e  4301              ORRS     r1,r1,r0
000010  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000012  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
000016  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000018  d021              BEQ      |L8.94|
;;;181            return 0;
;;;182        }
;;;183    
;;;184        tmp_in = SWD_REG_AP | SWD_REG_R | SWD_REG_ADR(adr);
00001a  072d              LSLS     r5,r5,#28
00001c  0f2d              LSRS     r5,r5,#28
00001e  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
000020  4305              ORRS     r5,r5,r0
;;;185        // first dummy read
;;;186        swd_transfer_retry(tmp_in, (uint32_t *)tmp_out);
000022  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000024  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000026  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
;;;187        ack = swd_transfer_retry(tmp_in, (uint32_t *)tmp_out);
00002a  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00002c  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
;;;188        *val = 0;
000032  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;189        tmp = tmp_out[3];
000034  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000036  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000038  78d1              LDRB     r1,[r2,#3]
;;;190        *val |= (tmp << 24);
00003a  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
;;;191        tmp = tmp_out[2];
00003c  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
00003e  7892              LDRB     r2,[r2,#2]
;;;192        *val |= (tmp << 16);
000040  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000042  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;193        tmp = tmp_out[1];
000044  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000046  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000048  7852              LDRB     r2,[r2,#1]
;;;194        *val |= (tmp << 8);
00004a  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8
00004c  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;195        tmp = tmp_out[0];
00004e  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000050  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000052  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]
;;;196        *val |= (tmp << 0);
000054  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;197        return (ack == 0x01);
000056  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000058  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00005a  d000              BEQ      |L8.94|
00005c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L8.94|
;;;198    }
00005e  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
;;;199    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.swd_read_byte||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_read_byte PROC
;;;422    // Read 8-bit byte from target memory.
;;;423    uint8_t swd_read_byte(uint32_t addr, uint8_t *val)
000000  b538              PUSH     {r3-r5,lr}
;;;424    {
000002  460d              MOV      r5,r1
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;425        uint32_t tmp;
;;;426    
;;;427        if (!swd_write_ap(AP_CSW, CSW_VALUE | CSW_SIZE8)) {
000006  4909              LDR      r1,|L9.44|
000008  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d00b              BEQ      |L9.42|
;;;428            return 0;
;;;429        }
;;;430    
;;;431        if (!swd_read_data(addr, &tmp)) {
000012  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000014  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000016  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
00001a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00001c  d005              BEQ      |L9.42|
;;;432            return 0;
;;;433        }
;;;434    
;;;435        *val = (uint8_t)(tmp >> ((addr & 0x03) << 3));
00001e  07a0              LSLS     r0,r4,#30
000020  0ec1              LSRS     r1,r0,#27
000022  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000024  40c8              LSRS     r0,r0,r1
000026  7028              STRB     r0,[r5,#0]
;;;436        return 1;
000028  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L9.42|
;;;437    }
00002a  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
;;;438    
                          ENDP

                  |L9.44|
                          DCD      0x23000050

                          AREA ||i.swd_read_core_register||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_read_core_register PROC
;;;607    
;;;608    uint8_t swd_read_core_register(uint32_t n, uint32_t *val)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;609    {
000002  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;610        int i = 0, timeout = 100;
;;;611    
;;;612        if (!swd_write_word(DCRSR, n)) {
000004  4601              MOV      r1,r0
000006  2400              MOVS     r4,#0                 ;610
000008  2664              MOVS     r6,#0x64              ;610
00000a  4812              LDR      r0,|L10.84|
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000010  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000012  d015              BEQ      |L10.64|
;;;613            return 0;
;;;614        }
;;;615    
;;;616        // wait for S_REGRDY
;;;617        for (i = 0; i < timeout; i++) {
;;;618            if (!swd_read_word(DHCSR, val)) {
000014  4f10              LDR      r7,|L10.88|
                  |L10.22|
000016  4911              LDR      r1,|L10.92|
000018  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
00001e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000020  d00d              BEQ      |L10.62|
000022  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000024  4638              MOV      r0,r7
000026  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
00002a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00002c  d007              BEQ      |L10.62|
;;;619                return 0;
;;;620            }
;;;621    
;;;622            if (*val & S_REGRDY) {
00002e  6828              LDR      r0,[r5,#0]
000030  03c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#15
000032  d402              BMI      |L10.58|
000034  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
000036  42b4              CMP      r4,r6                 ;617
000038  dbed              BLT      |L10.22|
                  |L10.58|
;;;623                break;
;;;624            }
;;;625        }
;;;626    
;;;627        if (i == timeout) {
00003a  42b4              CMP      r4,r6
00003c  d101              BNE      |L10.66|
                  |L10.62|
;;;628            return 0;
00003e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L10.64|
;;;629        }
;;;630    
;;;631        if (!swd_read_word(DCRDR, val)) {
;;;632            return 0;
;;;633        }
;;;634    
;;;635        return 1;
;;;636    }
000040  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L10.66|
000042  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;631
000044  4806              LDR      r0,|L10.96|
000046  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_word
00004a  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;631
00004c  d0f8              BEQ      |L10.64|
00004e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;635
000050  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;637    
                          ENDP

000052  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L10.84|
                          DCD      0xe000edf4
                  |L10.88|
                          DCD      0xe000edf0
                  |L10.92|
                          DCD      0x23000052
                  |L10.96|
                          DCD      0xe000edf8

                          AREA ||i.swd_read_data||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  swd_read_data PROC
;;;330    // Read target memory.
;;;331    static uint8_t swd_read_data(uint32_t addr, uint32_t *val)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;332    {
000002  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000004  b082              SUB      sp,sp,#8
;;;333        uint8_t tmp_in[4];
;;;334        uint8_t tmp_out[4];
;;;335        uint8_t req, ack;
;;;336        uint32_t tmp;
;;;337        // put addr in TAR register
;;;338        int2array(tmp_in, addr, 4);
000006  4601              MOV      r1,r0
000008  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
00000a  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       int2array
;;;339        req = SWD_REG_AP | SWD_REG_W | (1 << 2);
000010  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
;;;340    
;;;341        if (swd_transfer_retry(req, (uint32_t *)tmp_in) != 0x01) {
000012  a901              ADD      r1,sp,#4
000014  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
000018  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00001a  d11e              BNE      |L11.90|
;;;342            return 0;
;;;343        }
;;;344    
;;;345        // read data
;;;346        req = SWD_REG_AP | SWD_REG_R | (3 << 2);
00001c  200f              MOVS     r0,#0xf
;;;347    
;;;348        if (swd_transfer_retry(req, (uint32_t *)tmp_out) != 0x01) {
00001e  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000020  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
000024  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000026  d118              BNE      |L11.90|
;;;349            return 0;
;;;350        }
;;;351    
;;;352        // dummy read
;;;353        req = SWD_REG_DP | SWD_REG_R | SWD_REG_ADR(DP_RDBUFF);
000028  200e              MOVS     r0,#0xe
;;;354        ack = swd_transfer_retry(req, (uint32_t *)tmp_out);
00002a  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
;;;355        *val = 0;
000030  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;356        tmp = tmp_out[3];
000032  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000034  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000036  78d1              LDRB     r1,[r2,#3]
;;;357        *val |= (tmp << 24);
000038  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
;;;358        tmp = tmp_out[2];
00003a  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
00003c  7892              LDRB     r2,[r2,#2]
;;;359        *val |= (tmp << 16);
00003e  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000040  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;360        tmp = tmp_out[1];
000042  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000044  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000046  7852              LDRB     r2,[r2,#1]
;;;361        *val |= (tmp << 8);
000048  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8
00004a  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;362        tmp = tmp_out[0];
00004c  466a              MOV      r2,sp
00004e  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000050  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]
;;;363        *val |= (tmp << 0);
000052  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;364        return (ack == 0x01);
000054  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000056  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000058  d000              BEQ      |L11.92|
                  |L11.90|
00005a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L11.92|
;;;365    }
00005c  b002              ADD      sp,sp,#8
00005e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;366    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.swd_read_dp||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  swd_read_dp PROC
;;;129    // Read debug port register.
;;;130    uint8_t swd_read_dp(uint8_t adr, uint32_t *val)
000000  b538              PUSH     {r3-r5,lr}
;;;131    {
000002  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;132        uint32_t tmp_in;
;;;133        uint8_t tmp_out[4];
;;;134        uint8_t ack;
;;;135        uint32_t tmp;
;;;136        tmp_in = SWD_REG_DP | SWD_REG_R | SWD_REG_ADR(adr);
000004  210c              MOVS     r1,#0xc
000006  4008              ANDS     r0,r0,r1
;;;137        ack = swd_transfer_retry(tmp_in, (uint32_t *)tmp_out);
000008  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00000a  1c80              ADDS     r0,r0,#2
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
;;;138        *val = 0;
000010  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;139        tmp = tmp_out[3];
000012  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000014  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000016  78d1              LDRB     r1,[r2,#3]
;;;140        *val |= (tmp << 24);
000018  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
;;;141        tmp = tmp_out[2];
00001a  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
00001c  7892              LDRB     r2,[r2,#2]
;;;142        *val |= (tmp << 16);
00001e  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000020  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;143        tmp = tmp_out[1];
000022  466a              MOV      r2,sp
000024  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000026  7852              LDRB     r2,[r2,#1]
;;;144        *val |= (tmp << 8);
000028  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8
00002a  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;145        tmp = tmp_out[0];
00002c  466a              MOV      r2,sp
00002e  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000030  7812              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0]
;;;146        *val |= (tmp << 0);
000032  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;147        return (ack == 0x01);
000034  6021              STR      r1,[r4,#0]
000036  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000038  d000              BEQ      |L12.60|
00003a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L12.60|
;;;148    }
00003c  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
;;;149    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.swd_read_memory||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_read_memory PROC
;;;458    // size is in bytes.
;;;459    uint8_t swd_read_memory(uint32_t address, uint8_t *data, uint32_t size)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;460    {
000002  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000004  4614              MOV      r4,r2
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;461        uint32_t n;
;;;462    
;;;463        // Read bytes until word aligned
;;;464        while ((size > 0) && (address & 0x3)) {
;;;465            if (!swd_read_byte(address, data)) {
;;;466                return 0;
;;;467            }
;;;468    
;;;469            address++;
;;;470            data++;
;;;471            size--;
00000a  e013              B        |L13.52|
                  |L13.12|
00000c  4943              LDR      r1,|L13.284|
00000e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000010  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
000014  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000016  d07d              BEQ      |L13.276|
000018  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00001a  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
000020  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000022  d077              BEQ      |L13.276|
000024  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30
000026  0ec1              LSRS     r1,r0,#27
000028  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
00002a  40c8              LSRS     r0,r0,r1
00002c  7030              STRB     r0,[r6,#0]
00002e  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1              ;470
000030  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1              ;470
000032  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1              ;470
                  |L13.52|
000034  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;464
000036  d069              BEQ      |L13.268|
000038  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30             ;464
00003a  d1e7              BNE      |L13.12|
;;;472        }
;;;473    
;;;474        // Read word aligned blocks
;;;475        while (size > 3) {
00003c  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
00003e  d94c              BLS      |L13.218|
                  |L13.64|
;;;476            // Limit to auto increment page size
;;;477            n = TARGET_AUTO_INCREMENT_PAGE_SIZE - (address & (TARGET_AUTO_INCREMENT_PAGE_SIZE - 1));
000040  05a9              LSLS     r1,r5,#22
000042  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000044  0d89              LSRS     r1,r1,#22
000046  0280              LSLS     r0,r0,#10
000048  1a47              SUBS     r7,r0,r1
;;;478    
;;;479            if (size < n) {
00004a  42bc              CMP      r4,r7
00004c  d201              BCS      |L13.82|
;;;480                n = size & 0xFFFFFFFC; // Only count complete words remaining
00004e  08a7              LSRS     r7,r4,#2
000050  00bf              LSLS     r7,r7,#2
                  |L13.82|
000052  9600              STR      r6,[sp,#0]
000054  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
000056  d05d              BEQ      |L13.276|
000058  08b8              LSRS     r0,r7,#2
00005a  9003              STR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
00005c  4930              LDR      r1,|L13.288|
00005e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000060  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
000064  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000066  d055              BEQ      |L13.276|
000068  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
00006a  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
00006c  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
00006e  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000070  a804              ADD      r0,sp,#0x10
000072  f7fffffe          BL       int2array
000076  a904              ADD      r1,sp,#0x10
000078  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]
00007a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
00007e  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000080  d148              BNE      |L13.276|
000082  200f              MOVS     r0,#0xf
000084  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000086  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
000088  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
00008c  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00008e  d141              BNE      |L13.276|
000090  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000092  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
000094  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
000096  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000098  d011              BEQ      |L13.190|
00009a  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
00009c  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
00009e  9003              STR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
                  |L13.160|
0000a0  9900              LDR      r1,[sp,#0]
0000a2  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]
0000a4  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
0000a8  2801              CMP      r0,#1
0000aa  d133              BNE      |L13.276|
0000ac  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
0000ae  9903              LDR      r1,[sp,#0xc]
0000b0  1d00              ADDS     r0,r0,#4
0000b2  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
0000b4  9802              LDR      r0,[sp,#8]
0000b6  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
0000b8  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
0000ba  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0000bc  d3f0              BCC      |L13.160|
                  |L13.190|
0000be  200e              MOVS     r0,#0xe
0000c0  9900              LDR      r1,[sp,#0]
0000c2  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
0000c6  2801              CMP      r0,#1
0000c8  d000              BEQ      |L13.204|
0000ca  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L13.204|
;;;481            }
;;;482    
;;;483            if (!swd_read_block(address, data, n)) {
0000cc  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000ce  d021              BEQ      |L13.276|
;;;484                return 0;
;;;485            }
;;;486    
;;;487            address += n;
0000d0  19ed              ADDS     r5,r5,r7
;;;488            data += n;
0000d2  19f6              ADDS     r6,r6,r7
;;;489            size -= n;
0000d4  1be4              SUBS     r4,r4,r7
0000d6  2c03              CMP      r4,#3                 ;475
0000d8  d8b2              BHI      |L13.64|
                  |L13.218|
;;;490        }
;;;491    
;;;492        // Read remaining bytes
;;;493        while (size > 0) {
0000da  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
0000dc  d016              BEQ      |L13.268|
0000de  4f0f              LDR      r7,|L13.284|
                  |L13.224|
0000e0  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0000e2  4639              MOV      r1,r7
0000e4  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
0000e8  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000ea  d013              BEQ      |L13.276|
0000ec  4669              MOV      r1,sp
0000ee  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0000f0  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
0000f4  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000f6  d00d              BEQ      |L13.276|
0000f8  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30
0000fa  0ec1              LSRS     r1,r0,#27
0000fc  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
0000fe  40c8              LSRS     r0,r0,r1
000100  7030              STRB     r0,[r6,#0]
;;;494            if (!swd_read_byte(address, data)) {
;;;495                return 0;
;;;496            }
;;;497    
;;;498            address++;
;;;499            data++;
000102  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1
000104  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1
000106  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
000108  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;493
00010a  d1e9              BNE      |L13.224|
                  |L13.268|
;;;500            size--;
;;;501        }
;;;502    
;;;503        return 1;
00010c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;504    }
00010e  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000110  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
000112  e7ff              B        |L13.276|
                  |L13.276|
000114  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;495
000116  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000118  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;505    
                          ENDP

00011a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L13.284|
                          DCD      0x23000050
                  |L13.288|
                          DCD      0x23000052

                          AREA ||i.swd_read_word||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_read_word PROC
;;;394    // Read 32-bit word from target memory.
;;;395    uint8_t swd_read_word(uint32_t addr, uint32_t *val)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;396    {
000002  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;397        if (!swd_write_ap(AP_CSW, CSW_VALUE | CSW_SIZE32)) {
000006  4907              LDR      r1,|L14.36|
000008  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d006              BEQ      |L14.32|
;;;398            return 0;
;;;399        }
;;;400    
;;;401        if (!swd_read_data(addr, val)) {
000012  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000014  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000016  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
00001a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00001c  d000              BEQ      |L14.32|
;;;402            return 0;
;;;403        }
;;;404    
;;;405        return 1;
00001e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L14.32|
;;;406    }
000020  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;407    
                          ENDP

000022  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L14.36|
                          DCD      0x23000052

                          AREA ||i.swd_set_target_reset||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_set_target_reset PROC
;;;866    
;;;867    __attribute__((weak)) void swd_set_target_reset(uint8_t asserted)
000000  2240              MOVS     r2,#0x40
000002  4903              LDR      r1,|L15.16|
;;;868    {
;;;869        (asserted) ? PIN_nRESET_OUT(0) : PIN_nRESET_OUT(1);
000004  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000006  d001              BEQ      |L15.12|
000008  608a              STR      r2,[r1,#8]            ;868
;;;870    }
00000a  4770              BX       lr
                  |L15.12|
00000c  604a              STR      r2,[r1,#4]
00000e  4770              BX       lr
;;;871    
                          ENDP

                  |L15.16|
                          DCD      0x400ff080

                          AREA ||i.swd_set_target_state_hw||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_set_target_state_hw PROC
;;;871    
;;;872    uint8_t swd_set_target_state_hw(TARGET_RESET_STATE state)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;873    {
;;;874        uint32_t val;
;;;875        int8_t ap_retries = 2;
000002  2402              MOVS     r4,#2
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0                 ;873
;;;876        /* Calling swd_init prior to entering RUN state causes operations to fail. */
;;;877        if (state != RUN) {
000006  2806              CMP      r0,#6
000008  d001              BEQ      |L16.14|
;;;878            swd_init();
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_init
                  |L16.14|
;;;879        }
;;;880    
;;;881        switch (state) {
;;;882            case RESET_HOLD:
;;;883                swd_set_target_reset(1);
;;;884                break;
;;;885    
;;;886            case RESET_RUN:
;;;887                swd_set_target_reset(1);
;;;888                os_dly_wait(2);
;;;889                swd_set_target_reset(0);
;;;890                os_dly_wait(2);
;;;891                swd_off();
;;;892                break;
;;;893    
;;;894            case RESET_PROGRAM:
;;;895                if (!swd_init_debug()) {
;;;896                    return 0;
;;;897                }
;;;898    
;;;899                // Enable debug
;;;900                while(swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY | C_DEBUGEN) == 0) {
;;;901                    if( --ap_retries <=0 )
;;;902                        return 0;
;;;903                    // Target is in invalid state?
;;;904                    swd_set_target_reset(1);
;;;905                    os_dly_wait(2);
;;;906                    swd_set_target_reset(0);
;;;907                    os_dly_wait(2);
;;;908                }
;;;909    
;;;910                // Enable halt on reset
;;;911                if (!swd_write_word(DBG_EMCR, VC_CORERESET)) {
;;;912                    return 0;
;;;913                }
;;;914    
;;;915                // Reset again
;;;916                swd_set_target_reset(1);
;;;917                os_dly_wait(2);
;;;918                swd_set_target_reset(0);
;;;919                os_dly_wait(2);
;;;920    
;;;921                do {
;;;922                    if (!swd_read_word(DBG_HCSR, &val)) {
;;;923                        return 0;
;;;924                    }
;;;925                } while ((val & S_HALT) == 0);
;;;926    
;;;927                // Disable halt on reset
;;;928                if (!swd_write_word(DBG_EMCR, 0)) {
;;;929                    return 0;
;;;930                }
;;;931    
;;;932                break;
;;;933    
;;;934            case NO_DEBUG:
;;;935                if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY)) {
00000e  495f              LDR      r1,|L16.396|
000010  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;881
000012  1c4f              ADDS     r7,r1,#1              ;900
000014  4d5e              LDR      r5,|L16.400|
000016  4e5f              LDR      r6,|L16.404|
000018  2808              CMP      r0,#8                 ;881
00001a  d26f              BCS      |L16.252|
00001c  0002              MOVS     r2,r0                 ;881
00001e  447a              ADD      r2,r2,pc              ;881
000020  7912              LDRB     r2,[r2,#4]            ;881
000022  1892              ADDS     r2,r2,r2              ;881
000024  4497              ADD      pc,pc,r2              ;881
000026  0317              DCB      0x03,0x17
000028  07646b89          DCB      0x07,0x64,0x6b,0x89
00002c  a6ad              DCB      0xa6,0xad
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;883
000030  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
000034  e0a5              B        |L16.386|
000036  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;887
000038  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
00003c  4f56              LDR      r7,|L16.408|
00003e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;888
000040  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;888
000042  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;888
000044  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;889
000046  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
00004a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;890
00004c  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;890
00004e  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;890
000050  f7fffffe          BL       swd_off
000054  e095              B        |L16.386|
000056  f7fffffe          BL       swd_init_debug
00005a  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;895
00005c  d07e              BEQ      |L16.348|
00005e  4639              MOV      r1,r7                 ;900
000060  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;900
000062  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;900
000068  d116              BNE      |L16.152|
                  |L16.106|
00006a  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1              ;900
00006c  b264              SXTB     r4,r4                 ;901
00006e  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;901
000070  dd44              BLE      |L16.252|
000072  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;904
000074  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
000078  4f47              LDR      r7,|L16.408|
00007a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;905
00007c  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;905
00007e  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;905
000080  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;906
000082  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
000086  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;907
000088  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;907
00008a  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;907
00008c  4943              LDR      r1,|L16.412|
00008e  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;900
000090  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000094  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;900
000096  d0e8              BEQ      |L16.106|
                  |L16.152|
000098  4c41              LDR      r4,|L16.416|
00009a  2101              MOVS     r1,#1                 ;911
00009c  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;911
00009e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
0000a2  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;911
0000a4  d06e              BEQ      |L16.388|
0000a6  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;916
0000a8  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
0000ac  4f3a              LDR      r7,|L16.408|
0000ae  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;917
0000b0  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;917
0000b2  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;917
0000b4  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;918
0000b6  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
0000ba  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;919
0000bc  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;919
0000be  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;919
0000c0  462f              MOV      r7,r5                 ;900
                  |L16.194|
0000c2  466d              MOV      r5,sp                 ;922
0000c4  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;922
0000c6  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;922
0000c8  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
0000cc  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;922
0000ce  d05a              BEQ      |L16.390|
0000d0  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;922
0000d2  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;922
0000d4  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
0000d8  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;922
0000da  d054              BEQ      |L16.390|
0000dc  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;925
0000de  0380              LSLS     r0,r0,#14             ;925
0000e0  d5ef              BPL      |L16.194|
0000e2  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;928
0000e4  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;928
0000e6  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
0000ea  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;928
0000ec  d04a              BEQ      |L16.388|
0000ee  e048              B        |L16.386|
0000f0  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0000f2  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
0000f6  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000f8  d044              BEQ      |L16.388|
0000fa  e042              B        |L16.386|
                  |L16.252|
0000fc  e043              B        |L16.390|
;;;936                    return 0;
;;;937                }
;;;938    
;;;939                break;
;;;940    
;;;941            case DEBUG:
;;;942                if (!JTAG2SWD()) {
0000fe  f7fffffe          BL       JTAG2SWD
000102  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000104  d03e              BEQ      |L16.388|
000106  211e              MOVS     r1,#0x1e
000108  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00010a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
00010e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000110  d038              BEQ      |L16.388|
;;;943                    return 0;
;;;944                }
;;;945    
;;;946                if (!swd_clear_errors()) {
;;;947                    return 0;
;;;948                }
;;;949    
;;;950                // Ensure CTRL/STAT register selected in DPBANKSEL
;;;951                if (!swd_write_dp(DP_SELECT, 0)) {
000112  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000114  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000116  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
00011a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00011c  d032              BEQ      |L16.388|
;;;952                    return 0;
;;;953                }
;;;954    
;;;955                // Power up
;;;956                if (!swd_write_dp(DP_CTRL_STAT, CSYSPWRUPREQ | CDBGPWRUPREQ)) {
00011e  2105              MOVS     r1,#5
000120  0709              LSLS     r1,r1,#28
000122  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
000124  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
000128  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00012a  d02b              BEQ      |L16.388|
;;;957                    return 0;
;;;958                }
;;;959    
;;;960                // Enable debug
;;;961                if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY | C_DEBUGEN)) {
00012c  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00012e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000130  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000134  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000136  d025              BEQ      |L16.388|
000138  e023              B        |L16.386|
;;;962                    return 0;
;;;963                }
;;;964    
;;;965                break;
;;;966    
;;;967            case HALT:
;;;968                if (!swd_init_debug()) {
00013a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_init_debug
00013e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000140  d020              BEQ      |L16.388|
;;;969                    return 0;
;;;970                }
;;;971    
;;;972                // Enable debug and halt the core (DHCSR <- 0xA05F0003)
;;;973                if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY | C_DEBUGEN | C_HALT)) {
000142  4918              LDR      r1,|L16.420|
000144  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000146  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
00014a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00014c  d01a              BEQ      |L16.388|
                  |L16.334|
;;;974                    return 0;
;;;975                }
;;;976    
;;;977                // Wait until core is halted
;;;978                do {
;;;979                    if (!swd_read_word(DBG_HCSR, &val)) {
00014e  466c              MOV      r4,sp
000150  4631              MOV      r1,r6
000152  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000154  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
000158  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00015a  e000              B        |L16.350|
                  |L16.348|
00015c  e012              B        |L16.388|
                  |L16.350|
00015e  d012              BEQ      |L16.390|
000160  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000162  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000164  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
000168  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00016a  d00c              BEQ      |L16.390|
;;;980                        return 0;
;;;981                    }
;;;982                } while ((val & S_HALT) == 0);
00016c  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
00016e  0380              LSLS     r0,r0,#14
000170  d5ed              BPL      |L16.334|
000172  e006              B        |L16.386|
;;;983                break;
;;;984    
;;;985            case RUN:
;;;986                if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY)) {
000174  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000176  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
00017a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00017c  d002              BEQ      |L16.388|
;;;987                    return 0;
;;;988                }
;;;989                swd_off();
00017e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_off
                  |L16.386|
;;;990                break;
;;;991    
;;;992            case POST_FLASH_RESET:
;;;993                // This state should be handled in target_reset.c, nothing needs to be done here.
;;;994                break;
;;;995    
;;;996            default:
;;;997                return 0;
;;;998        }
;;;999    
;;;1000       return 1;
000182  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L16.388|
;;;1001   }
000184  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L16.390|
000186  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;997
000188  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;1002   
                          ENDP

00018a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L16.396|
                          DCD      0xa05f0000
                  |L16.400|
                          DCD      0xe000edf0
                  |L16.404|
                          DCD      0x23000052
                  |L16.408|
                          DCD      rt_dly_wait
                  |L16.412|
                          DCD      0xa05f0001
                  |L16.416|
                          DCD      0xe000edfc
                  |L16.420|
                          DCD      0xa05f0003

                          AREA ||i.swd_set_target_state_sw||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_set_target_state_sw PROC
;;;1002   
;;;1003   uint8_t swd_set_target_state_sw(TARGET_RESET_STATE state)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;1004   {
;;;1005       uint32_t val;
;;;1006       int8_t ap_retries = 2;
000002  2402              MOVS     r4,#2
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0                 ;1004
;;;1007       /* Calling swd_init prior to enterring RUN state causes operations to fail. */
;;;1008       if (state != RUN) {
000006  2806              CMP      r0,#6
000008  d001              BEQ      |L17.14|
;;;1009           swd_init();
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_init
                  |L17.14|
;;;1010       }
;;;1011   
;;;1012       switch (state) {
;;;1013           case RESET_HOLD:
;;;1014               swd_set_target_reset(1);
;;;1015               break;
;;;1016   
;;;1017           case RESET_RUN:
;;;1018               swd_set_target_reset(1);
;;;1019               os_dly_wait(2);
;;;1020               swd_set_target_reset(0);
;;;1021               os_dly_wait(2);
;;;1022               swd_off();
;;;1023               break;
;;;1024   
;;;1025           case RESET_PROGRAM:
;;;1026               if (!swd_init_debug()) {
;;;1027                   return 0;
;;;1028               }
;;;1029   
;;;1030               // Enable debug and halt the core (DHCSR <- 0xA05F0003)
;;;1031               while (swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY | C_DEBUGEN | C_HALT) == 0) {
;;;1032                   if ( --ap_retries <=0 ) {
;;;1033                       return 0;
;;;1034                   }
;;;1035                   // Target is in invalid state?
;;;1036                   swd_set_target_reset(1);
;;;1037                   os_dly_wait(2);
;;;1038                   swd_set_target_reset(0);
;;;1039                   os_dly_wait(2);
;;;1040               }
;;;1041   
;;;1042               // Wait until core is halted
;;;1043               do {
;;;1044                   if (!swd_read_word(DBG_HCSR, &val)) {
;;;1045                       return 0;
;;;1046                   }
;;;1047               } while ((val & S_HALT) == 0);
;;;1048   
;;;1049               // Enable halt on reset
;;;1050               if (!swd_write_word(DBG_EMCR, VC_CORERESET)) {
;;;1051                   return 0;
;;;1052               }
;;;1053   
;;;1054               // Perform a soft reset
;;;1055               if (!swd_read_word(NVIC_AIRCR, &val)) {
;;;1056                   return 0;
;;;1057               }
;;;1058   
;;;1059               if (!swd_write_word(NVIC_AIRCR, VECTKEY | (val & SCB_AIRCR_PRIGROUP_Msk) | SOFT_RESET)) {
;;;1060                   return 0;
;;;1061               }
;;;1062   
;;;1063               os_dly_wait(2);
;;;1064   
;;;1065               do {
;;;1066                   if (!swd_read_word(DBG_HCSR, &val)) {
;;;1067                       return 0;
;;;1068                   }
;;;1069               } while ((val & S_HALT) == 0);
;;;1070   
;;;1071               // Disable halt on reset
;;;1072               if (!swd_write_word(DBG_EMCR, 0)) {
;;;1073                   return 0;
;;;1074               }
;;;1075   
;;;1076               break;
;;;1077   
;;;1078           case NO_DEBUG:
;;;1079               if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY)) {
00000e  496c              LDR      r1,|L17.448|
000010  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;1012
000012  1ccf              ADDS     r7,r1,#3              ;1031
000014  4d6b              LDR      r5,|L17.452|
000016  4e6c              LDR      r6,|L17.456|
000018  2808              CMP      r0,#8                 ;1012
00001a  d27d              BCS      |L17.280|
00001c  0002              MOVS     r2,r0                 ;1012
00001e  447a              ADD      r2,r2,pc              ;1012
000020  7912              LDRB     r2,[r2,#4]            ;1012
000022  1892              ADDS     r2,r2,r2              ;1012
000024  4497              ADD      pc,pc,r2              ;1012
000026  0317              DCB      0x03,0x17
000028  077f85a5          DCB      0x07,0x7f,0x85,0xa5
00002c  c0c7              DCB      0xc0,0xc7
00002e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1014
000030  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
000034  e0bf              B        |L17.438|
000036  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1018
000038  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
00003c  4f63              LDR      r7,|L17.460|
00003e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1019
000040  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;1019
000042  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;1019
000044  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1020
000046  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
00004a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1021
00004c  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;1021
00004e  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;1021
000050  f7fffffe          BL       swd_off
000054  e0af              B        |L17.438|
000056  f7fffffe          BL       swd_init_debug
00005a  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1026
00005c  d07d              BEQ      |L17.346|
00005e  4639              MOV      r1,r7                 ;1031
000060  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;1031
000062  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1031
000068  d116              BNE      |L17.152|
                  |L17.106|
00006a  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1              ;1031
00006c  b264              SXTB     r4,r4                 ;1032
00006e  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;1032
000070  dd52              BLE      |L17.280|
000072  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1036
000074  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
000078  4f54              LDR      r7,|L17.460|
00007a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1037
00007c  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;1037
00007e  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;1037
000080  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1038
000082  f7fffffe          BL       swd_set_target_reset
000086  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1039
000088  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;1039
00008a  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;1039
00008c  4950              LDR      r1,|L17.464|
00008e  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;1031
000090  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000094  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1031
000096  d0e8              BEQ      |L17.106|
                  |L17.152|
000098  4634              MOV      r4,r6                 ;1031
                  |L17.154|
00009a  466e              MOV      r6,sp                 ;1044
00009c  4621              MOV      r1,r4                 ;1044
00009e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1044
0000a0  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
0000a4  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1044
0000a6  d037              BEQ      |L17.280|
0000a8  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;1044
0000aa  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;1044
0000ac  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
0000b0  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1044
0000b2  d031              BEQ      |L17.280|
0000b4  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;1047
0000b6  0380              LSLS     r0,r0,#14             ;1047
0000b8  d5ef              BPL      |L17.154|
0000ba  4e46              LDR      r6,|L17.468|
0000bc  2101              MOVS     r1,#1                 ;1050
0000be  4630              MOV      r0,r6                 ;1050
0000c0  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
0000c4  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1050
0000c6  d077              BEQ      |L17.440|
0000c8  4f43              LDR      r7,|L17.472|
0000ca  4669              MOV      r1,sp                 ;1055
0000cc  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;1055
0000ce  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_word
0000d2  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1055
0000d4  d070              BEQ      |L17.440|
0000d6  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;1059
0000d8  0d71              LSRS     r1,r6,#21             ;1059
0000da  4008              ANDS     r0,r0,r1              ;1059
0000dc  493f              LDR      r1,|L17.476|
0000de  1841              ADDS     r1,r0,r1              ;1059
0000e0  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;1059
0000e2  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
0000e6  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1059
0000e8  d066              BEQ      |L17.440|
0000ea  4f38              LDR      r7,|L17.460|
0000ec  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1063
0000ee  46bc              MOV      r12,r7                ;1063
0000f0  df00              SVC      #0x0                  ;1063
0000f2  4627              MOV      r7,r4                 ;1063
                  |L17.244|
0000f4  466c              MOV      r4,sp                 ;1066
0000f6  4639              MOV      r1,r7                 ;1066
0000f8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1066
0000fa  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
0000fe  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1066
000100  d05b              BEQ      |L17.442|
000102  4621              MOV      r1,r4                 ;1066
000104  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;1066
000106  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
00010a  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1066
00010c  d055              BEQ      |L17.442|
00010e  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;1069
000110  0380              LSLS     r0,r0,#14             ;1069
000112  d5ef              BPL      |L17.244|
000114  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;1072
000116  e000              B        |L17.282|
                  |L17.280|
000118  e04f              B        |L17.442|
                  |L17.282|
00011a  4630              MOV      r0,r6                 ;1072
00011c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000120  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;1072
000122  d049              BEQ      |L17.440|
000124  e047              B        |L17.438|
000126  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000128  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
00012c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00012e  d043              BEQ      |L17.440|
000130  e041              B        |L17.438|
;;;1080                   return 0;
;;;1081               }
;;;1082   
;;;1083               break;
;;;1084   
;;;1085           case DEBUG:
;;;1086               if (!JTAG2SWD()) {
000132  f7fffffe          BL       JTAG2SWD
000136  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000138  d03e              BEQ      |L17.440|
00013a  211e              MOVS     r1,#0x1e
00013c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00013e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
000142  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000144  d038              BEQ      |L17.440|
;;;1087                   return 0;
;;;1088               }
;;;1089   
;;;1090               if (!swd_clear_errors()) {
;;;1091                   return 0;
;;;1092               }
;;;1093   
;;;1094               // Ensure CTRL/STAT register selected in DPBANKSEL
;;;1095               if (!swd_write_dp(DP_SELECT, 0)) {
000146  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000148  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
00014a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
00014e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000150  d032              BEQ      |L17.440|
;;;1096                   return 0;
;;;1097               }
;;;1098   
;;;1099               // Power up
;;;1100               if (!swd_write_dp(DP_CTRL_STAT, CSYSPWRUPREQ | CDBGPWRUPREQ)) {
000152  2105              MOVS     r1,#5
000154  0709              LSLS     r1,r1,#28
000156  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
000158  e000              B        |L17.348|
                  |L17.346|
00015a  e02d              B        |L17.440|
                  |L17.348|
00015c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
000160  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000162  d029              BEQ      |L17.440|
;;;1101                   return 0;
;;;1102               }
;;;1103   
;;;1104               // Enable debug
;;;1105               if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY | C_DEBUGEN)) {
000164  491e              LDR      r1,|L17.480|
000166  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000168  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
00016c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00016e  d023              BEQ      |L17.440|
000170  e021              B        |L17.438|
;;;1106                   return 0;
;;;1107               }
;;;1108   
;;;1109               break;
;;;1110   
;;;1111           case HALT:
;;;1112               if (!swd_init_debug()) {
000172  f7fffffe          BL       swd_init_debug
000176  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000178  d01e              BEQ      |L17.440|
;;;1113                   return 0;
;;;1114               }
;;;1115   
;;;1116               // Enable debug and halt the core (DHCSR <- 0xA05F0003)
;;;1117               if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY | C_DEBUGEN | C_HALT)) {
00017a  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00017c  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00017e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000182  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000184  d018              BEQ      |L17.440|
                  |L17.390|
;;;1118                   return 0;
;;;1119               }
;;;1120   
;;;1121               // Wait until core is halted
;;;1122               do {
;;;1123                   if (!swd_read_word(DBG_HCSR, &val)) {
000186  466c              MOV      r4,sp
000188  4631              MOV      r1,r6
00018a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00018c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
000190  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000192  d012              BEQ      |L17.442|
000194  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000196  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000198  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
00019c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00019e  d00c              BEQ      |L17.442|
;;;1124                       return 0;
;;;1125                   }
;;;1126               } while ((val & S_HALT) == 0);
0001a0  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
0001a2  0380              LSLS     r0,r0,#14
0001a4  d5ef              BPL      |L17.390|
0001a6  e006              B        |L17.438|
;;;1127               break;
;;;1128   
;;;1129           case RUN:
;;;1130               if (!swd_write_word(DBG_HCSR, DBGKEY)) {
0001a8  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0001aa  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
0001ae  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0001b0  d002              BEQ      |L17.440|
;;;1131                   return 0;
;;;1132               }
;;;1133               swd_off();
0001b2  f7fffffe          BL       swd_off
                  |L17.438|
;;;1134               break;
;;;1135   
;;;1136           case POST_FLASH_RESET:
;;;1137               // This state should be handled in target_reset.c, nothing needs to be done here.
;;;1138               break;
;;;1139   
;;;1140           default:
;;;1141               return 0;
;;;1142       }
;;;1143   
;;;1144       return 1;
0001b6  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L17.440|
;;;1145   }
0001b8  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L17.442|
0001ba  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1141
0001bc  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;1146   #endif
                          ENDP

0001be  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L17.448|
                          DCD      0xa05f0000
                  |L17.452|
                          DCD      0xe000edf0
                  |L17.456|
                          DCD      0x23000052
                  |L17.460|
                          DCD      rt_dly_wait
                  |L17.464|
                          DCD      0xa05f0003
                  |L17.468|
                          DCD      0xe000edfc
                  |L17.472|
                          DCD      0xe000ed0c
                  |L17.476|
                          DCD      0x05fa0004
                  |L17.480|
                          DCD      0xa05f0001

                          AREA ||i.swd_transfer_retry||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  swd_transfer_retry PROC
;;;87     
;;;88     uint8_t swd_transfer_retry(uint32_t req, uint32_t *data)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;89     {
000002  460d              MOV      r5,r1
000004  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;90         uint8_t i, ack;
;;;91     
;;;92         for (i = 0; i < MAX_SWD_RETRY; i++) {
000006  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
                  |L18.8|
;;;93             ack = SWD_Transfer(req, data);
000008  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00000a  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       SWD_Transfer
;;;94     
;;;95             // if ack != WAIT
;;;96             if (ack != DAP_TRANSFER_WAIT) {
000010  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000012  d103              BNE      |L18.28|
000014  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
000016  b2e4              UXTB     r4,r4                 ;92
000018  2c64              CMP      r4,#0x64              ;92
00001a  d3f5              BCC      |L18.8|
                  |L18.28|
;;;97                 return ack;
;;;98             }
;;;99         }
;;;100    
;;;101        return ack;
;;;102    }
00001c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;103    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.swd_write_ap||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_write_ap PROC
;;;200    // Write access port register
;;;201    uint8_t swd_write_ap(uint32_t adr, uint32_t val)
000000  b538              PUSH     {r3-r5,lr}
;;;202    {
000002  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;203        uint8_t data[4];
;;;204        uint8_t req, ack;
;;;205        uint32_t apsel = adr & 0xff000000;
000004  0e01              LSRS     r1,r0,#24
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0                 ;202
;;;206        uint32_t bank_sel = adr & APBANKSEL;
000008  22f0              MOVS     r2,#0xf0
00000a  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24             ;205
00000c  4010              ANDS     r0,r0,r2
;;;207    
;;;208        if (!swd_write_dp(DP_SELECT, apsel | bank_sel)) {
00000e  4301              ORRS     r1,r1,r0
000010  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000012  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_dp
000016  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000018  d006              BEQ      |L19.40|
;;;209            return 0;
;;;210        }
;;;211    
;;;212        switch (adr) {
00001a  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
00001c  d106              BNE      |L19.44|
;;;213            case AP_CSW:
;;;214                if (dap_state.csw == val) {
00001e  480e              LDR      r0,|L19.88|
000020  6841              LDR      r1,[r0,#4]  ; dap_state
000022  42a9              CMP      r1,r5
000024  d101              BNE      |L19.42|
;;;215                    return 1;
000026  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L19.40|
;;;216                }
;;;217    
;;;218                dap_state.csw = val;
;;;219                break;
;;;220    
;;;221            default:
;;;222                break;
;;;223        }
;;;224    
;;;225        req = SWD_REG_AP | SWD_REG_W | SWD_REG_ADR(adr);
;;;226        int2array(data, val, 4);
;;;227    
;;;228        if (swd_transfer_retry(req, (uint32_t *)data) != 0x01) {
;;;229            return 0;
;;;230        }
;;;231    
;;;232        req = SWD_REG_DP | SWD_REG_R | SWD_REG_ADR(DP_RDBUFF);
;;;233        ack = swd_transfer_retry(req, NULL);
;;;234        return (ack == 0x01);
;;;235    }
000028  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
                  |L19.42|
00002a  6045              STR      r5,[r0,#4]            ;218  ; dap_state
                  |L19.44|
00002c  200c              MOVS     r0,#0xc               ;225
00002e  4004              ANDS     r4,r4,r0              ;225
000030  2204              MOVS     r2,#4                 ;226
000032  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;226
000034  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;226
000036  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;226
000038  f7fffffe          BL       int2array
00003c  4669              MOV      r1,sp                 ;228
00003e  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;228
000040  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
000044  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;228
000046  d105              BNE      |L19.84|
000048  200e              MOVS     r0,#0xe               ;232
00004a  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;233
00004c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
000050  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;234
000052  d0e9              BEQ      |L19.40|
                  |L19.84|
000054  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;234
000056  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
;;;236    
                          ENDP

                  |L19.88|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.swd_write_byte||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_write_byte PROC
;;;439    // Write 8-bit byte to target memory.
;;;440    uint8_t swd_write_byte(uint32_t addr, uint8_t val)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;441    {
000002  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;442        uint32_t tmp;
;;;443    
;;;444        if (!swd_write_ap(AP_CSW, CSW_VALUE | CSW_SIZE8)) {
000006  4908              LDR      r1,|L20.40|
000008  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d009              BEQ      |L20.38|
;;;445            return 0;
;;;446        }
;;;447    
;;;448        tmp = val << ((addr & 0x03) << 3);
000012  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30
000014  0ec0              LSRS     r0,r0,#27
000016  4084              LSLS     r4,r4,r0
000018  4621              MOV      r1,r4
;;;449    
;;;450        if (!swd_write_data(addr, tmp)) {
00001a  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_data
000020  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000022  d000              BEQ      |L20.38|
;;;451            return 0;
;;;452        }
;;;453    
;;;454        return 1;
000024  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L20.38|
;;;455    }
000026  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;456    
                          ENDP

                  |L20.40|
                          DCD      0x23000050

                          AREA ||i.swd_write_core_register||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_write_core_register PROC
;;;637    
;;;638    uint8_t swd_write_core_register(uint32_t n, uint32_t val)
000000  b5f3              PUSH     {r0,r1,r4-r7,lr}
;;;639    {
000002  b081              SUB      sp,sp,#4
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;640        int i = 0, timeout = 100;
000006  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000008  2664              MOVS     r6,#0x64
;;;641    
;;;642        if (!swd_write_word(DCRDR, val)) {
00000a  4814              LDR      r0,|L21.92|
00000c  9902              LDR      r1,[sp,#8]
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000012  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000014  d01a              BEQ      |L21.76|
;;;643            return 0;
;;;644        }
;;;645    
;;;646        if (!swd_write_word(DCRSR, n | REGWnR)) {
000016  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000018  0400              LSLS     r0,r0,#16
00001a  4305              ORRS     r5,r5,r0
00001c  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00001e  4810              LDR      r0,|L21.96|
000020  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_word
000024  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000026  d011              BEQ      |L21.76|
;;;647            return 0;
;;;648        }
;;;649    
;;;650        // wait for S_REGRDY
;;;651        for (i = 0; i < timeout; i++) {
;;;652            if (!swd_read_word(DHCSR, &val)) {
000028  4d0e              LDR      r5,|L21.100|
                  |L21.42|
00002a  af02              ADD      r7,sp,#8
00002c  490e              LDR      r1,|L21.104|
00002e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000030  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
000034  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000036  d00e              BEQ      |L21.86|
000038  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00003a  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       swd_read_data
000040  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000042  d008              BEQ      |L21.86|
;;;653                return 0;
;;;654            }
;;;655
