;;;656            if (val & S_REGRDY) {
000044  9802              LDR      r0,[sp,#8]
000046  03c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#15
000048  d502              BPL      |L21.80|
;;;657                return 1;
00004a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L21.76|
;;;658            }
;;;659        }
;;;660    
;;;661        return 0;
;;;662    }
00004c  b003              ADD      sp,sp,#0xc
00004e  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L21.80|
000050  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
000052  42b4              CMP      r4,r6                 ;651
000054  dbe9              BLT      |L21.42|
                  |L21.86|
000056  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;661
000058  b003              ADD      sp,sp,#0xc
00005a  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;663    
                          ENDP

                  |L21.92|
                          DCD      0xe000edf8
                  |L21.96|
                          DCD      0xe000edf4
                  |L21.100|
                          DCD      0xe000edf0
                  |L21.104|
                          DCD      0x23000052

                          AREA ||i.swd_write_data||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  swd_write_data PROC
;;;367    // Write target memory.
;;;368    static uint8_t swd_write_data(uint32_t address, uint32_t data)
000000  b538              PUSH     {r3-r5,lr}
;;;369    {
000002  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;370        uint8_t tmp_in[4];
;;;371        uint8_t req, ack;
;;;372        // put addr in TAR register
;;;373        int2array(tmp_in, address, 4);
000004  4601              MOV      r1,r0
000006  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
000008  4668              MOV      r0,sp
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       int2array
;;;374        req = SWD_REG_AP | SWD_REG_W | (1 << 2);
00000e  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
;;;375    
;;;376        if (swd_transfer_retry(req, (uint32_t *)tmp_in) != 0x01) {
000010  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000012  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
000016  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000018  d110              BNE      |L22.60|
;;;377            return 0;
;;;378        }
;;;379    
;;;380        // write data
;;;381        int2array(tmp_in, data, 4);
00001a  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
00001c  4621              MOV      r1,r4
00001e  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000020  f7fffffe          BL       int2array
;;;382        req = SWD_REG_AP | SWD_REG_W | (3 << 2);
000024  200d              MOVS     r0,#0xd
;;;383    
;;;384        if (swd_transfer_retry(req, (uint32_t *)tmp_in) != 0x01) {
000026  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000028  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
00002c  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00002e  d105              BNE      |L22.60|
;;;385            return 0;
;;;386        }
;;;387    
;;;388        // dummy read
;;;389        req = SWD_REG_DP | SWD_REG_R | SWD_REG_ADR(DP_RDBUFF);
000030  200e              MOVS     r0,#0xe
;;;390        ack = swd_transfer_retry(req, NULL);
000032  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000034  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
;;;391        return (ack == 0x01) ? 1 : 0;
000038  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00003a  d000              BEQ      |L22.62|
                  |L22.60|
00003c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L22.62|
;;;392    }
00003e  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
;;;393    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.swd_write_dp||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_write_dp PROC
;;;150    // Write debug port register
;;;151    uint8_t swd_write_dp(uint8_t adr, uint32_t val)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;152    {
;;;153        uint32_t req;
;;;154        uint8_t data[4];
;;;155        uint8_t ack;
;;;156    
;;;157        //check if the right bank is already selected
;;;158        if ((adr == DP_SELECT) && (dap_state.select == val)) {
000002  4f0e              LDR      r7,|L23.60|
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0                 ;152
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1                 ;152
000008  2808              CMP      r0,#8
00000a  d102              BNE      |L23.18|
00000c  6838              LDR      r0,[r7,#0]  ; dap_state
00000e  42a8              CMP      r0,r5
000010  d011              BEQ      |L23.54|
                  |L23.18|
;;;159            return 1;
;;;160        }
;;;161    
;;;162        req = SWD_REG_DP | SWD_REG_W | SWD_REG_ADR(adr);
000012  200c              MOVS     r0,#0xc
000014  4626              MOV      r6,r4
000016  4006              ANDS     r6,r6,r0
;;;163        int2array(data, val, 4);
000018  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
00001a  4668              MOV      r0,sp
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       int2array
;;;164        ack = swd_transfer_retry(req, (uint32_t *)data);
000020  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000022  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000024  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
;;;165        if ((ack == DAP_TRANSFER_OK) && (adr == DP_SELECT)) {
000028  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00002a  d001              BEQ      |L23.48|
;;;166            dap_state.select = val;
;;;167        }
;;;168        return (ack == 0x01);
00002c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;169    }
00002e  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L23.48|
000030  2c08              CMP      r4,#8                 ;165
000032  d100              BNE      |L23.54|
000034  603d              STR      r5,[r7,#0]            ;166  ; dap_state
                  |L23.54|
000036  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;168
000038  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;170    
                          ENDP

00003a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L23.60|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.swd_write_memory||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_write_memory PROC
;;;507    // size is in bytes.
;;;508    uint8_t swd_write_memory(uint32_t address, uint8_t *data, uint32_t size)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;509    {
000002  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000004  4614              MOV      r4,r2
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;510        uint32_t n = 0;
;;;511    
;;;512        // Write bytes until word aligned
;;;513        while ((size > 0) && (address & 0x3)) {
;;;514            if (!swd_write_byte(address, *data)) {
;;;515                return 0;
;;;516            }
;;;517    
;;;518            address++;
;;;519            data++;
;;;520            size--;
00000a  e012              B        |L24.50|
                  |L24.12|
00000c  7837              LDRB     r7,[r6,#0]            ;514
00000e  493d              LDR      r1,|L24.260|
000010  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;514
000012  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
000016  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;514
000018  d071              BEQ      |L24.254|
00001a  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30             ;514
00001c  0ec0              LSRS     r0,r0,#27             ;514
00001e  4639              MOV      r1,r7                 ;514
000020  4081              LSLS     r1,r1,r0              ;514
000022  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;514
000024  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_data
000028  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;514
00002a  d068              BEQ      |L24.254|
00002c  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1              ;514
00002e  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1              ;514
000030  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1              ;514
                  |L24.50|
000032  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;513
000034  d05f              BEQ      |L24.246|
000036  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30             ;513
000038  d1e8              BNE      |L24.12|
;;;521        }
;;;522    
;;;523        // Write word aligned blocks
;;;524        while (size > 3) {
00003a  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
00003c  d944              BLS      |L24.200|
                  |L24.62|
;;;525            // Limit to auto increment page size
;;;526            n = TARGET_AUTO_INCREMENT_PAGE_SIZE - (address & (TARGET_AUTO_INCREMENT_PAGE_SIZE - 1));
00003e  05a9              LSLS     r1,r5,#22
000040  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000042  0d89              LSRS     r1,r1,#22
000044  0280              LSLS     r0,r0,#10
000046  1a47              SUBS     r7,r0,r1
;;;527    
;;;528            if (size < n) {
000048  42bc              CMP      r4,r7
00004a  d201              BCS      |L24.80|
;;;529                n = size & 0xFFFFFFFC; // Only count complete words remaining
00004c  08a7              LSRS     r7,r4,#2
00004e  00bf              LSLS     r7,r7,#2
                  |L24.80|
000050  9600              STR      r6,[sp,#0]
000052  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
000054  d053              BEQ      |L24.254|
000056  08b8              LSRS     r0,r7,#2
000058  9003              STR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
00005a  492b              LDR      r1,|L24.264|
00005c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00005e  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
000062  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000064  d04b              BEQ      |L24.254|
000066  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
000068  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
00006a  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
00006c  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00006e  a804              ADD      r0,sp,#0x10
000070  f7fffffe          BL       int2array
000074  a904              ADD      r1,sp,#0x10
000076  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]
000078  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
00007c  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00007e  d13e              BNE      |L24.254|
000080  200d              MOVS     r0,#0xd
000082  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
000084  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000086  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
000088  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
00008a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00008c  d90e              BLS      |L24.172|
                  |L24.142|
00008e  9900              LDR      r1,[sp,#0]
000090  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]
000092  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
000096  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000098  d131              BNE      |L24.254|
00009a  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
00009c  9903              LDR      r1,[sp,#0xc]
00009e  1d00              ADDS     r0,r0,#4
0000a0  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
0000a2  9802              LDR      r0,[sp,#8]
0000a4  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
0000a6  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
0000a8  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0000aa  d3f0              BCC      |L24.142|
                  |L24.172|
0000ac  200e              MOVS     r0,#0xe
0000ae  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000b0  f7fffffe          BL       swd_transfer_retry
0000b4  2801              CMP      r0,#1
0000b6  d000              BEQ      |L24.186|
0000b8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L24.186|
;;;530            }
;;;531    
;;;532            if (!swd_write_block(address, data, n)) {
0000ba  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000bc  d01f              BEQ      |L24.254|
;;;533                return 0;
;;;534            }
;;;535    
;;;536            address += n;
0000be  19ed              ADDS     r5,r5,r7
;;;537            data += n;
0000c0  19f6              ADDS     r6,r6,r7
;;;538            size -= n;
0000c2  1be4              SUBS     r4,r4,r7
0000c4  2c03              CMP      r4,#3                 ;524
0000c6  d8ba              BHI      |L24.62|
                  |L24.200|
;;;539        }
;;;540    
;;;541        // Write remaining bytes
;;;542        while (size > 0) {
0000c8  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
0000ca  d014              BEQ      |L24.246|
                  |L24.204|
;;;543            if (!swd_write_byte(address, *data)) {
0000cc  7837              LDRB     r7,[r6,#0]
0000ce  490d              LDR      r1,|L24.260|
0000d0  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0000d2  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
0000d6  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000d8  d011              BEQ      |L24.254|
0000da  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30
0000dc  0ec0              LSRS     r0,r0,#27
0000de  4639              MOV      r1,r7
0000e0  4081              LSLS     r1,r1,r0
0000e2  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0000e4  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_data
0000e8  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000ea  d008              BEQ      |L24.254|
0000ec  1e64              SUBS     r4,r4,#1
0000ee  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
0000f0  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1
0000f2  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;542
0000f4  d1ea              BNE      |L24.204|
                  |L24.246|
;;;544                return 0;
;;;545            }
;;;546    
;;;547            address++;
;;;548            data++;
;;;549            size--;
;;;550        }
;;;551    
;;;552        return 1;
0000f6  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;553    }
0000f8  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
0000fa  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
0000fc  e7ff              B        |L24.254|
                  |L24.254|
0000fe  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;544
000100  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000102  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;554    
                          ENDP

                  |L24.260|
                          DCD      0x23000050
                  |L24.264|
                          DCD      0x23000052

                          AREA ||i.swd_write_word||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  swd_write_word PROC
;;;408    // Write 32-bit word to target memory.
;;;409    uint8_t swd_write_word(uint32_t addr, uint32_t val)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;410    {
000002  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;411        if (!swd_write_ap(AP_CSW, CSW_VALUE | CSW_SIZE32)) {
000006  4907              LDR      r1,|L25.36|
000008  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_ap
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d006              BEQ      |L25.32|
;;;412            return 0;
;;;413        }
;;;414    
;;;415        if (!swd_write_data(addr, val)) {
000012  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000014  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000016  f7fffffe          BL       swd_write_data
00001a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00001c  d000              BEQ      |L25.32|
;;;416            return 0;
;;;417        }
;;;418    
;;;419        return 1;
00001e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L25.32|
;;;420    }
000020  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;421    
                          ENDP

000022  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L25.36|
                          DCD      0x23000052

                          AREA ||.data||, DATA, ALIGN=2

                  dap_state
                          %        8

;*** Start embedded assembler ***
